jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description: Senior Full Stack Engineer for core platform team. React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS.
jobs.requirements: React, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, AWS, 5+ years

jobs.title: Backend Engineer - Payments
jobs.description: Build reliable payment processing systems with Go, PostgreSQL, Kafka.
jobs.requirements: Go, Python, PostgreSQL, Kafka, distributed systems

jobs.title: DevOps / Platform Engineer
jobs.description: Build and maintain cloud infrastructure on AWS. CI/CD, K8s, observability.

jobs.requirements: Product management, A/B testing, analytics, SQL
